onChainActivity.summary: Agent shares wallet 0x9D65433B3FE597C15a46D2365F8F2c1701Eb9e4A with 48 mainnet txs on Base + Optimism. Project targets Celo Alfajores for remittance execution.

decisions.reasoning: Celo has sub-cent tx fees and stablecoin focus — ideal for remittance. Email as UX layer means no wallet needed on receiver end

decisions.decision: Integrate Self Protocol for ZK identity
decisions.reasoning: Remittance requires identity verification. Self Protocol provides ZK proofs without exposing PII — privacy-preserving KYC
Private inference for transaction risk analysis. No data retention means sender financial patterns stay confidential
Added structured error system, input validation with injection protection, rate limiting, correlation IDs

liveDemo.note: First real end-to-end remittance. Funds in agent wallet, claim email in Dr Deeks' inbox.
